texto: Medieval Technology? The Middle Ages invented among other things the crank the horse collar eyeglasses the flying buttress the stirrup the windmill the wheelbarrow printing firearms paper the canal lock the compass the rudder the mechanical clock the spinning wheel and the treadle.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Joseph and Frances Gies que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Medieval Technology? The Middle Ages invented among other things the crank the horse collar eyegl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sucesso, science, technology, com foco em technology.
